_meta.description: Per-token guidance on how to safely acquire it. Critical for tokens with multiple bridge variants (wBTC, USDC) where 'just search the wallet' would give wrong address.

schema.native_chain: the chain that originally issues this token
schema.native_address: the address on the native chain
schema.route_to_terra: ordered array of steps to safely acquire on Terra
schema.warnings: array of things to NOT do
schema.verified: true = personally tested by council member; false / 'route_known_unverified' = documented from research but not test-deposited

route_to_terra: 1. Acquire USDC on Noble — either via Circle CCTP (from Ethereum, Polygon, Base, Avalanche, Solana, etc.) or directly on Noble
2. IBC send to Terra via Noble → Terra channel
warnings: Keplr search for 'USDC' shows DOZENS of variants across Ethereum, Polygon, Solana, Sei, Osmosis, etc. — only Noble-issued USDC routed via IBC is correct for Terra.
Do NOT use Polygon USDC, Solana USDC, or Ethereum-bridged USDC directly — those don't exist on Terra as the same address.
If unsure: use Skip.go and select 'send to Terra: USDC'. Skip.go will handle the bridging in one tx and select the correct path.
alternative_routes: Skip.go can handle the full bridge in one transaction — select destination Terra and asset USDC.

route_to_terra: 1. Hold ATOM on a Cosmos Hub address (e.g. via Keplr)
2. IBC transfer from Cosmos Hub → Terra using Keplr's built-in cross-chain transfer
3. Token arrives on Terra as ATOM at ibc/27394FB0...
4. Works in both Astroport AND Skeleton Swap LPs within TLA
warnings: Skeleton Swap's API labels this as 'ATOM on Dungeon' at a different IBC denom (ibc/C3988DBA...) — that label is misleading. The actual SS pool contracts hold the standard ATOM at ibc/27394FB0... (verified by depositing standard-IBC ATOM successfully into both DEX's LUNA-ATOM LPs).
alternative_routes: Skip.go select 'Cosmos Hub → Terra → ATOM' — handles the IBC transfer in one click
ibc/27394FB092D2ECCD56123C74F36E4C1F9260.notes: Empirically tested 2026-06-02: same denom accepted by Astroport's ATOM-LUNA LP and Skeleton Swap's ATOM-LUNA LP. Cross-DEX verification (17 pairs) confirmed all TLA pools use this exact ATOM denom.

route_to_terra: 1. Acquire WBTC on Ethereum (any exchange or onchain swap to 0x2260...)
2. Use Skip.go: select 'Send to Terra: WBTC' — Skip handles the Eureka IBC bridge route via Cosmos Hub
3. Token arrives on Terra as wBTC.atom (at ibc/88386AC4...) — Astroport's UI labels this simply 'WBTC' without the .atom suffix
warnings: TLA uses wBTC.atom SPECIFICALLY — not wBTC.axl (ibc/05D29988...) or wBTC.osmo (ibc/CF57A83C...). These are all separate Terra addresses for the same underlying Ethereum asset but bridged via different paths.
Astroport's wallet view labels this as just 'WBTC' (no suffix). The Terra address is the only stable identity — confirm before depositing.
Eris UI's '.atom' label refers to the bridge path (via Cosmos Hub), not a Cosmos-native asset.
alternative_routes: Direct route: WBTC on Ethereum → bridge to Cosmos Hub via Eureka → IBC to Terra. Skip.go automates this whole path.
ibc/88386AC48152D48B34B082648DF836F97550.notes: Route documented based on bridge metadata (Skip.go + Eureka IBC). Council deposit test would upgrade to verified=true.

route_to_terra: 1. Acquire PAX Gold (PAXG) on Ethereum (Coinbase, Kraken, Paxos directly, etc.)
2. Use Skip.go: select 'Send to Terra: PAXG' — same Eureka IBC route as wBTC.atom
3. Token arrives on Terra as PAXG at ibc/0EF56305...
warnings: PAXG is gold-backed (1 PAXG ≈ 1 troy ounce of physical gold held by Paxos). It carries real-world counterparty risk distinct from a pure crypto asset.
Same bridge path as wBTC.atom (Ethereum → Cosmos Hub via Eureka → Terra). If wBTC.atom worked for you, PAXG should follow the same pattern.
alternative_routes: Manual route via wallets if Skip.go doesn't list PAXG: PAXG on Ethereum → Cosmos Hub (Eureka bridge) → IBC to Terra
ibc/0EF5630576C66968EF0787868CF09FD866FA.notes: Bridge data shows source_chain=ethereum, route mirrors wBTC.atom. CG verification matched 'pax-gold' via bridge-trace fallback (Stage 7c).

route_to_terra: 1. Visit creda.money to deposit approved collateral and mint wBTC.creda.a
2. Minted token is delivered directly to your Terra address — no bridge involved
3. Acquisition mechanics, fees, and collateral requirements are per Creda's product (not an IBC bridge)
warnings: This is NOT a bridged wBTC — it's a synthetic wBTC issued by Creda Finance natively on Terra. Treat it as a Creda product with Creda's specific collateralization risks.
Do not confuse with wBTC.atom (true bridged WBTC from Ethereum via Cosmos Hub), wBTC.axl (Axelar bridge), or wBTC.osmo (Osmosis bridge).
Acquisition route is via Creda's frontend; council members have not personally tested the mint flow.
terra1jjvy4s4tyw3ym6s3wk896up6jthvha9vtw.notes: Confirmed cw20 (not IBC) — minted natively on Terra by Creda. Single-asset stake in TLA's 'single' bucket.

_example_wbtc_atom_disabled._note: OBSOLETE — replaced by the live entry above at the actual address. Remove this stub when comfortable.

_curation_queue.description: Tokens we know need acquisition guides. Fill in addresses + steps as you confirm.

candidates.hint: USDt (Tether) — bridge data suggests Kava IBC route. Address: ibc/9B19062D46CAB50361CE9B0A3E6D0A7A53AC9E7CB361F32A73CC733144A9A9E5. Owner has not personally verified the Kava route.
EURe — bridge data shows it's from Polygon, but owner noted: 'truly don't know how you get it'. Address: ibc/8D52B251B447B7160421ACFBD50F6B0ABE5F98D2C404B03701130F12044439A1. Needs research.
ASTRO (Neutron) — native Neutron token, IBC to Terra. Verified-not-yet.
xASTRO (Neutron) — staked ASTRO, IBC to Terra. Verified-not-yet.
FUEL (Neutron) — native Neutron, IBC to Terra. Verified-not-yet.
ROAR — Terra-native cw20, available on Astroport/SS. Acquire by swapping LUNA→ROAR via Astroport.
CAPA — Terra-native, available on Astroport/SS. Acquire by swapping LUNA→CAPA.
SOLID — Terra-native stablecoin, available via Solid Protocol or USDC-SOLID LP swap.
ampLUNA / arbLUNA / ampROAR / ampCAPA — Terra-native LSTs, mint from Eris Protocol directly using the input asset.
WBTC.axl at ibc/05D29988... — bridged via Axelar (Ethereum → Axelar → Terra). Different from wBTC.atom.
WBTC.osmo at ibc/CF57A83C... — bridged via Osmosis (Ethereum → Osmosis → Terra). Different from wBTC.atom.
